title: RSI Sentinel Tool
subtitle: RSI Divergence Detection — Regular and Hidden, Bullish and Bearish, with Backtest Accuracy Reporting
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: EXTRACT — divergence detection framework (4 types), swing-based comparison logic, and backtesting accuracy reporting. RSI divergence is a powerful secondary confirmation gate.

core_concept.name: RSI Divergence — Four Types
core_concept.description: Instead of using RSI as overbought/oversold levels, use RSI RELATIVE MOMENTUM vs PRICE DIRECTION. Divergence = RSI and price disagreeing about direction. Four types cover both reversals (regular) and continuations (hidden).

four_divergence_types.regular_bullish: Price makes lower low,  RSI makes higher low  → likely upward reversal
four_divergence_types.regular_bearish: Price makes higher high, RSI makes lower high → likely downward reversal
four_divergence_types.hidden_bullish: Price makes higher low,  RSI makes lower low  → uptrend continuation
four_divergence_types.hidden_bearish: Price makes lower high,  RSI makes higher high → downtrend continuation

buy_conditions: Regular bullish OR hidden bullish divergence detected
sell_conditions: Regular bearish OR hidden bearish divergence detected
core_concept.relevance_to_creviaderiv: RSI divergence can be a powerful ADDITIONAL gate or zone quality filter. If price returns to a demand zone AND shows regular bullish RSI divergence, the confluence dramatically raises signal quality. Our current gate chain doesn't include divergence — this is an upgrade opportunity.

data_requirements.name: swing_lows
data_requirements.method: IsSignificantSwingLow: bar is local minimum within left/right window, price difference >= InpMinSwingDiffPct

data_requirements.name: swing_highs
data_requirements.method: IsSignificantSwingHigh: bar is local maximum within left/right window, price difference >= InpMinSwingDiffPct

swing_left.description: Bars left of pivot to check for swing detection

swing_right.description: Bars right of pivot to check

eval_bars.description: Bars to wait after signal before evaluating accuracy

arrow_offset.description: Arrow placement offset from swing extreme

min_swing_diff_pct.description: Min % price diff between two swing extremes to qualify as a real swing

min_rsi_diff.description: Min RSI point difference between two swings to qualify as divergence

use_rsi_threshold.description: Require RSI <= 30 on the earlier bullish swing for validation

divergence_detection_algorithm.step_1_find_swings: Scan last lookback bars for significant local minima and maxima (IsSignificantSwingLow/High)
divergence_detection_algorithm.step_2_select_recent_pair: Take the two most recent swing lows (for bullish) or swing highs (for bearish)
divergence_detection_algorithm.step_3_compare_price: Compare price at swing1 vs price at swing2
divergence_detection_algorithm.step_4_compare_rsi: Compare RSI at swing1 vs RSI at swing2

step_5_classify.regular_bullish: price[1] < price[2] AND rsi[1] > rsi[2] AND rsi_diff >= min_rsi_diff
step_5_classify.regular_bearish: price[1] > price[2] AND rsi[1] < rsi[2] AND rsi_diff >= min_rsi_diff
step_5_classify.hidden_bullish: price[1] > price[2] AND rsi[1] < rsi[2] AND rsi_diff >= min_rsi_diff
step_5_classify.hidden_bearish: price[1] < price[2] AND rsi[1] > rsi[2] AND rsi_diff >= min_rsi_diff

divergence_detection_algorithm.step_6_deduplicate: Check min_bars_between_signals to prevent cluster signals

steps.name: compute_rsi
steps.description: Calculate RSI(14) for last lookback bars

steps.name: detect_swing_pivots
steps.description: Find significant local extrema using swing_left/right window and min_swing_diff_pct filter
steps.is_swing_low: lows[i] == min(lows[i-left:i+right+1]) AND (lows[i-1] - lows[i]) / lows[i] >= min_swing_diff_pct
steps.is_swing_high: highs[i] == max(highs[i-left:i+right+1]) AND (highs[i] - highs[i+1]) / highs[i] >= min_swing_diff_pct

steps.name: classify_divergence
steps.description: Compare most recent two swing lows (for bullish) or two swing highs (for bearish)

steps.name: validate_rsi_difference
steps.description: RSI difference between the two swings must be >= min_rsi_diff (prevents false divergence from tiny RSI moves)

steps.name: draw_and_log
steps.description: Draw arrow at signal bar, update dashboard labels with signal counts

steps.name: accuracy_evaluation
steps.description: After eval_bars: check if price moved in signal direction. Track regular vs hidden accuracy separately.

backtest_accuracy_reporting.method: Check price N bars after signal vs entry price
backtest_accuracy_reporting.note: Simple direction check only — not profit-weighted. A 1-pip win counts same as 100-pip win.

components_to_build.name: DivergenceDetector
components_to_build.returns: List of DivergenceSignal(type, bar_idx, price, rsi_at_signal, divergence_type)
components_to_build.note: Pure function. Returns all 4 divergence types in one pass.

components_to_build.name: SwingDetector
components_to_build.contract: find_swings(highs, lows, left_window, right_window, min_diff_pct) -> (swing_highs, swing_lows)
components_to_build.note: Simple fractals: local extrema within window. Returns bar indices of valid swings.

keep: All 4 divergence types (regular bullish/bearish + hidden bullish/bearish) — complete framework
Swing-based RSI comparison (not tick-level) — more meaningful and noise-resistant
min_rsi_diff filter — prevents false divergence from tiny RSI fluctuations
min_swing_diff_pct filter — percentage-based, works across instruments (vs fixed pip threshold)
Separate tracking of regular vs hidden accuracy — hidden divergence has different reliability profile
Backtest accuracy report at close — useful for validation
discard: min_bars_between_signals = 1 — too loose, clusters signals. Use 5-10 bars minimum.
Single-timeframe only — add multi-TF: divergence on H1 confirmed by M15 entry
No SL/TP — signals only, no risk management
improve: Add divergence as a ZONE QUALITY FILTER: demand zone + regular bullish RSI divergence = high confidence
Add multi-timeframe: H1 divergence sets context, M15 entry on confirmation
Add divergence strength score: how many bars between swings? Wider divergence = stronger signal
Add confluence counting: how many divergence types agree? All 4 pointing bullish = very strong
Weight accuracy by pip outcome not just direction (1-pip win ≠ 100-pip win)

creviaderiv_insights.divergence_as_zone_quality_filter: Our current zone quality score (impulsive=80, corrective=40) could include divergence: +20 bonus if RSI shows regular bullish divergence at a demand zone. This gives a structural + momentum confluence score.
creviaderiv_insights.hidden_divergence_for_continuation: We only look for reversal setups (zone touch = potential reversal). Hidden divergence identifies CONTINUATION setups — price pulls back to a level but RSI stays strong. This is the zone retest in an active trend. High relevance for our HL/LH zone identification.
creviaderiv_insights.swing_detection_upgrade: The article explicitly flags their swing detection as needing external library support for precision. Our StructureEngine fractal detection (with configurable lookback and trendline-first filtering) is the proper implementation they're pointing toward.

article_figures.title: Bullish Divergence
article_figures.insight: Price makes lower low, RSI makes higher low. Classic reversal setup.

article_figures.title: Bearish Divergence
article_figures.insight: Price makes higher high, RSI makes lower high. Momentum weakening before price.

article_figures.title: Hidden Bullish Divergence
article_figures.insight: Price makes higher low (uptrend intact), RSI makes lower low. Trend continuation.

article_figures.title: Hidden Bearish Divergence
article_figures.insight: Price makes lower high (downtrend intact), RSI makes higher high. Continuation of downtrend.
